name: Chicken Bog
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 6 cups of water and bring to a boil.
2. Add salt, chopped onion, and chicken to the boiling water. Simmer until the chicken is tender (about 1 hour).
3. Remove the cooked chicken from the pot and let it cool. Once cooled, remove the bones and chop the meat into bite-sized pieces.
4. Skim off any fat from the juices in the pot.
5. Measure 3 1/2 cups of broth into a 6-quart saucepan.
6. Add rice, chopped chicken, smoked sausage, herb seasoning, and "chicken and herb" seasoning to the saucepan.
7. Cook the ingredients together for 30 minutes until the rice is tender.
8. Allow the mixture to come to a boil, then reduce heat to low and keep covered.
9. If the rice mixture is too liquidy, cook uncovered until the desired consistency is reached.
10. Yield: 6 servings
